title: PPIP -  Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Share Data
scenario: "Share Data" toggle defaults to ON in App Settings > General > Account after onboarding "Continue as Guest" flow
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or after clearing app data).
3. On the final onboarding screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
4. Observe the PPIP (Privacy/Data Sharing) dialog that appears.
5. Verify the dialog message reads: "Help us improve your experience."
7. Observe that the dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed.
8. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
10. Verify the toggle is set to ON by default.

11. Verify the description text explains that basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, and that personal information is excluded and data is not shared with third parties.
expected: After onboarding, tapping "Continue as Guest" shows a PPIP dialog with the message "Help us improve your experience." Tapping "Share Data" closes the dialog and navigates to the Home screen. In App Settings > General > Account, a "Share Data" toggle is present, defaults to ON, and includes a description stating that basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, excluding personal information and third-party sharing.
